title: WF-015 hardening (3/3) — scheduled security sweep (audit verify + drift scan run automatically)
business_reason: Audit-integrity verification and permission-drift scanning only ran when a human clicked. A scheduled sweep runs both automatically (nightly), turning them from on-demand tools into always-on controls that open incidents without anyone asking.

design.shared_logic: Extracted the verify + scan logic into runAuditIntegrityCheck (server/security/auditIntegrity.ts) and runPermissionDriftScan (server/security/permissionDriftRun.ts); the staff routes AND the job handlers call them — single source. permissionDrift.ts stays PURE (unit-tested).
design.handlers: Implemented the existing security.audit_hash_verify + security.permission_drift_scan job stubs (server/jobs/handlers.ts), run with SYSTEM_ACTOR.
design.cron: GET/POST /api/cron/security-sweep enqueues both jobs + drains them; authorized by Vercel Cron (Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET) or dev-auth locally. vercel.json schedules it daily at 02:00.
design.ui: the staff Audit Integrity & Drift page already exposes the manual triggers.

param_14.question: Do the security checks run automatically?
param_14.answer: Yes. A daily Vercel cron hits /api/cron/security-sweep, which enqueues and runs both the audit-integrity verification and the permission-drift scan as system jobs. Tampering or high-risk drift opens an incident automatically — no human trigger needed. The same checks remain available on-demand from the staff console.
param_14.answer_source: job runner (enqueueJob/drainJobs), security job handlers, vercel.json crons, WF-015 hardening
param_14.security_implications: always-on detection (not reliant on a human); cron endpoint gated by CRON_SECRET in production (dev-auth only locally); runs as the system actor; every sweep audited; idempotent findings/incidents (no duplicate noise).
param_14.approval_implications: none (detection only); incidents/findings then follow their remediation lifecycles.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: alerting on sweep results; suspicious_login_scan handler (same pattern); per-finding remediation tasks.

verify: npx playwright test security_sweep audit_integrity permission_drift
